comments:
The repository is at https://github.com/jrpool/kilotest.
The package is published at https://www.npmjs.com/package/@jrpool/kilotest.
features: Kilotest uses an ensemble of 10 rule engines to test web pages for accessibility, usability, and standard conformance. It reports test results at several levels of granularity. It has a web user interface for human users and an API for AI agents.
title: Kilotest
